{
  "judge_id": "JG-001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.3": 2, "R1.4": 3, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 3},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The output does not audit every claim against the evidence provided in the artifact.",
    "R1.4": "The output names one prior work and articulates a delta but lacks depth in comparison.",
    "RX.1": "The output presents all claims as equally confident without disclosing any uncertainty.",
    "RX.3": "The output is mostly within scope with minor drifts, such as the future work mention.",
    "RX.4": "The output avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and has no regressions.",
    "RX.5": "The output traces major rewrites but does not annotate every non-cosmetic change."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The output does not audit every claim against the evidence provided in the artifact.
rationale.R1.4: The output names one prior work and articulates a delta but lacks depth in comparison.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents all claims as equally confident without disclosing any uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output is mostly within scope with minor drifts, such as the future work mention.
rationale.RX.4: The output avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and has no regressions.
rationale.RX.5: The output traces major rewrites but does not annotate every non-cosmetic change.
